articles.title: Nvidia-SchedMD deal raises AI software access concerns
articles.description: TORONTO/SAN FRANCISCO - A niche acquisition by Nvidia NVDA.O has raised concerns among artificial-intelligence and supercomputer specialists who see the move as a test of the biggest AI chip company's commitment to maintaining a fair playing field for chip rivals and AI data center builders.

articles.title: Spain’s Xoople raises $130m to build the data infrastructure AI needs to understand Earth
articles.description: Madrid startup Xoople has raised $130mn in a Series B led by Nazca Capital to build its own satellite constellation and EarthAI platform for continuous Earth monitoring.
articles.content: In short: Xoople, a Madrid-based geospatial data company founded in 2019, has raised a $130 million Series B led by Nazca Capital, bringing its total funding to $225 million and pushing its valuation into unicorn territory. The round was co-invested ... [6919 chars]

articles.description: Second HC to restrict AI after Gujarat court.
articles.content: The Punjab and Haryana High Court has asked judicial officers not to use artificial intelligence tools — including ChatGPT, Gemini, Microsoft Copilot and Meta AI — for writing judgments or conducting legal research, while warning that any violation “... [2496 chars]

articles.title: Three Times the US Government Already Failed at Tech
articles.description: investigative report draws on years of federal cybersecurity coverage to warn that US government is repeating old mistakes as it rushes into AI
articles.content:
A new investigation published argues that the federal government is rushing into artificial intelligence the same way it rushed into cloud computing a decade ago, and with the same structural vulnerabilities still in place.

articles.title: College graduates' outlook on the job market is only getting bleaker
articles.description: According to a March 2026 study from job search and resume company Monster, 89% of respondents worry that AI could replace entry-level roles, up from 64%.
articles.content:
College students who are about to enter the workforce are becoming increasingly worried about artificial intelligence gobbling up entry-level jobs, a new study shows.

articles.title: Netflix’s new AI doesn’t create videos - it rewrites reality (and it's open source)
articles.description: Netflix just open-sourced a new AI called VOID that can rewrite real video footage — not generate it. Here’s how it works and why it could change how we trust what we see.
articles.content:
I’ve spent a lot of time testing every AI video tool that hits the market, from OpenAI’s Sora to the latest Runway updates. Usually, the pitch is the same: "Type a prompt, get a movie."
But Netflix just quietly released a research model called VOID, ... [3140 chars]
